entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (ArachiHypogaea L.) investigated for nutritional disorders causing chlorosis.

entities.name: CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A nutritional disorder characterized by the yellowing of leaf tissue.

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The level of iron present in plant tissues, specifically the leaves.

entities.name: O-PHENANTHROLINE EXTRACTION
entities.description: A chemical analysis method used to estimate extractable ferrous iron in plant tissues.

entities.name: FERROUS IRON
entities.description: The specific form of iron estimated by the o-phenanthroline extraction method.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research center where the investigations were conducted.

entities.name: YOUNGEST LEAF TISSUE
entities.description: The plant part identified as the most appropriate for analysis because it is where chlorosis occurs and iron levels are lowest.
